h2e0922d2g9ccag4a26g98b8g3ce1e3d7ad38: Your voice sounds weak. What's going on?
h5879ce20g4647g4904g9349gabf905460435: Spike got creative with that poker.
h5c60829eg5978g4439gaddag2041c4f38910: There are drow here. They've got plans for me. Where are you?
ha5f66cd8g79fag451aga294gcc49c26b4991: Why worry? If they kill you, you'll just be reborn in Hell.
heb5b9d8bgacc6g47cfgae90g009ae35f19f6: I'm a cambion, not a devil, you fool. I can die.
h3b3aab32g4d5cg47eega371g7e63cfb17045: But they've got something different in mind. Something to do with this Absolute they're all crowing about.
h302081c5g9872g4d5cg9433g2746ac8e5aff: I'll come to the rescue - if you cancel our pact.
h0533a1ccgb11fg45c6ga007g79a112d0cdf8: Fine. Get me out of this cesspit, and I'll disappear for good.
haab22a22ga4beg4c71ga29cgbed4fffaeb8a: No more pact. No more obligation.
hbccf7e53g976ag49f7g9055g8e1d229fd1b0: Sounds too good to be true.
h963dd50egc0e9g4966ga9d1g5dfee7a48a6b: I've never gone b... ..promise... ...I ...hell are you... your hands off of...
h2ae3ede5g2305g45ccg8eeegf19539a55bc3: I promise - I won't g... ...I ...hell are you... your hands off of...
h39555ab7g9781g4d12ga2c0g96871c7a7a3f: I know what you want, Wyll.
h81b731f6g9ddeg4058ga5aeg58bf76e4ceb9: Get me out of this cesspit, and I'll disappear for good.
h73a09432g4ed0g4c03gb965g9f3d875a0f4f: Then my father will. And your eternal soul will be his.
h641b8a57g0853g4470gac90g3d6f449594eb: Don't worry. You're in good hands with me.
h1a83b7dbg4b77g4722gb68bgf913c07219c7: Why are the drow working with goblins?
hd854ee2agdcf8g4e42gb925gce060af21e2b: Baltazo's balls, how should I know? But one thing's for certain: they don't want me dead.
hf1885697gde60g454eg8e20g5e9ef81af881: They've got something different in mind. Something to do with this Absolute they're all crowing about.
h113f5a53gd546g485bg8673gb2cb7a6487ae: I should just let them keep you.
h688be6d9gba5fg4e0egb71fg06cd13efee33: Not if you want out of our bargain.
h55e80b45gb6e4g4d5fga613ge181161b47f6: I'm closing in. You need to hang on a bit longer.
h91bef667g9cf0g4242g9157gffbae63f129a: It's about time you rely on me, and not the other way around.
h36b22d29g3c4dg45eagb5e1g4d2145326809: Find me, and you can gloat all you want.
h76fbaf69g174eg4661g8b7fgb3ea16e87bd7: Shut up and listen. I don't have much time.
h4de17b34gcfcbg4efbg83fcg4b99c5bcf8ae: Goblins captured me. I'm chained to a wall in some old temple. They put a collar around my neck that renders me powerless.
h69e20222ga588g4b5fga2aag771fc5a5d6a5: And you know who dragged me out here. Your old chum Spike.
h666a50aegf278g4a11ga58egd9d011150d97: Spike? I remember him all too well.
h8379354bga1ceg46abg9164g95aa5e531915: *Your mind races with memories. The air smells of smoke and Flaming Fist corpses. The squealing goblin lunges at you, dagger in hand.*
h432579a3g2255g401cg94e2g0dbdbedb5674: *You double over in pain as the blade pierces your eye. And then - darkness.*
h6e4462c1g9b35g4e42gacc3g6d0ae24b4586: Wyll? Wyll! Snap out of it!
hfc38200fg73d6g4a1agbd09g423365f55a1a: Spike's hounding me about some weapon on the nautiloid.
h68e158e8g1ab7g4373gb6c1ge9ba91e79456: Judging by the poker he's gone to heat up, he plans to burn the 'truth' out of me.
h82dca697g1c4eg46d8g938dg2b5bc731cccb: Graz'zt's cock - he's coming back. Hurry.
h13607b1fgc3eeg4e46gb5f4g2c0c18783083: Why worry? If they kill you, you'll just be reborn in Hell.
h951842ffg8ed2g4cb6g813fg6e79bbe57e68: I'm a cambion, not a devil you fool. I can die.
h809c2896g5fa0g4d9agb3a7g542aed35661f: Spike's gone to heat up a poker, and I have a few guesses about how he might use it.
h8e384502g42f5g42fbgace9gd5761ab97858: Didn't I tell you to shut up?
hfa620acdg2ef9g4b42ga9f0g1db6ed403b60: I don't know shit about any weapon.
h63681e5dg15e5g4bc3g9cc7ge13f3d95be31: But judging by that poker he's gone to heat up, he plans to burn the 'truth' out of me.
h59d088efgf99ag44e3ga06egc6dbcfbb17a8: Didn't I tell you to shut up?
h8d015f75gef8eg4d54gbffbg7b6dd59e8c92: Shut out your memories and let Mizora continue.
h532895fegcfa5g4203gaab0gba52ec9a4667: Didn't I tell you to shut up?
h2cfc5b32g04d9g45c3g8803g2c46e4ade49f: Finally. Where in the Nine Hells have you been?
h125a677fgba39g46fcgb1e9gf5120fbfa4be: *Your stone eye buzzes with every word spoken. The voice is Mizora's.*
h8d65900cg1f09g4238gb699gf34bc1408854: What a relief - I'm glad you're all right.
hf1357687ga01dg4cefgbdc3g7cc09da78cd0: All right? I've been snatched by illithids, locked in a pod, and dropped in the mud. I am far from 'all right'.
h66906d88g9346g4b47gbe5cg75e21354d02d: I've had quite an adventure myself.
hf5db24b7g7e02g4985g895age2198ffb327b: Adventure? This isn't a heroic caper, sweetheart. That's an Illithid tadpole in your brain.
haf4f8ac5g9355g480eg8816g305c156df364: Let it fester for long, and you'll be birthing a squid from your head-holes.
hdeff7a2ag5babg44bbg8463g33caefcb12d2: You want that thing out? Brush the dust out of your eye and get over here.
hc89002a3gfe87g4cd4g816bgf9c2b0387bdb: That's the golden question, sweetheart. I hear water - best I can say is to find a river to follow.
h1517016egd253g4884ga7baga8e492ac27d4: Now be a good little Blade and... wait. What's...
h868f2845g7aefg41c5gbd3eg9db5b091008e: *... and you quickly recognise their source: goblins.*
h0ab3a2c1g9c82g4187gb202ga80ac4911c23: *... but you can make no sense of them.*
hc98e5a75g44deg44bfg8ee3gf77001041173: You're a powerful cambion, aren't you? Just free yourself.
h2d28b971g0415g4394g965agb1790c8f360b: Oh, sweetheart. If I could do that, do you think I'd still be inside this thing?
h1461234bg54fbg4a56g9144g026195edebf3: I'll think about it and get back to you.
hea37a368g40e1g4110gabfcg07aea23c23ee: Now's not the time for still feet, sweetheart. Unless you fancy your lips sprouting tentacles.
h3e1aa856ga2e3g41ebgb43cg25670c0a64e3: That's the golden question, sweetheart. I hear water - best I can say is to find a river to follow.
hbc40cb2ag3c91g48ceg85ccgf56623b3db21: You want that tadpole out of your head? Brush the dust out of your eye and get moving.
h57d1b5f7gc9abg4568ga867gc4353b80bcc6: Hold tight - I'm on my way.
h063b8cafg3ac6g4a22gbf86gaec193c9874c: Well aren't you a good little... wait. What's...
h128d0a5eg59b8g4031ga122g8fb03da8c771: I'm stuck with you, aren't I?
heff173d8gbfb9g48a3gb72ag786b3221bbd7: Stuck? Sweetheart, I'm not your burden - I'm your saviour.
h592bdd4cge20fg4fffg94ceg755d4b1c14f3: That's an Illithid tadpole in your brain. Let it fester for long, and you'll be birthing a squid from your head-holes.
hd1947dd6g7b06g4695g8be8ga265da235a12: Watch your tone. You'll speak with respect.
h00550446g6869g40c1g8306g318734a67164: I've been snatched by illithids, locked in a pod, and dropped in the mud. You'll get used to my tone.
hd1830827g73c3g4670gab4fge51b51df8174: I'm sorry - who is this? You're breaking up...
hd1f647f0g280dg467bg92c7g5af04cba33d9: I've been snatched by illithids, locked in a pod, and dropped in the mud. I'm in no mood for games.
h4cbf37f1g4a2dg43a3ga4ccgd1d52ef05dc7: *A rhythmic thudding breaks through the silence.*
he8c5ca3ag29f1g4d73g8891gff08005bb794: *Beneath the thuds, you hear the telltale squeaks of a cart's axles.*
hc2008f35g6327g48b6gab79g500537064216: *The thuds trail off before you can identify them.*
h47965fcbg1dbbg40a7gae2agcedbdab3b28a: ...put me inside of that... ...to be kidding...
h2b1d0a2cg7a60g4c14ga0e1gc05e1c6e35d5: *A shriek rings out, and your eye buzzes in tandem.*
h3ed6f09cg640cg4ab0gad63gd56ff09b34e4: *A guttural growl follows - and then, all is still.*
hb1141261g35deg463dga420g921d1cbc04e4: Be strong, Mizora. I'm on my way!
h8409e77cg9036g4f7bg960dg604d046fd385: Sounds like torture. I can think of no one more deserving.
